title: Packer
description:
Company Overview

SEW-EURODRIVE is a German MNC and has been established in Singapore since 1981 with close to 80 employees. ISO 9001 certified for the Production & Distribution of Geared Motors. The Company specialises in manufacturing gear units, motors, electric motor and inverter technology. Customer-specific and pre-defined modular solutions are also available. Today, the Company has more than 17,000 employees in 437 plants across 49 countries.

Job Summary

You will perform essential packaging and assembly support tasks, including preparing nameplates, measuring and weighing packages, creating handling units, and managing package transfers to ensure smooth dispatch and storage processes.

Responsibilities

  • Create and rivet nameplates on complete units to ensure proper identification and traceability.
  • Measure and weigh packages accurately to comply with shipping and handling requirements.
  • Create handling units for complete units and spare parts to facilitate safe transport and storage.
  • Verify that packing specifications are met to maintain product quality and safety standards.
  • Transfer packages directly to the dispatch area or designated storage locations to support efficient logistics.
  • Create storage locations for packages when direct transfer to dispatch is not possible, ensuring organized inventory management.
  • Scan completed assembly orders into the in-house software system to maintain accurate production records.
  • Use basic software tools on the job to support packaging and inventory processes.
  • Collaborate effectively with team members and demonstrate willingness to learn new tasks and procedures.

Required competencies and certifications

  • Basic English proficiency in spoken and written communication to understand instructions and document tasks.
  • No prior experience required; training will be provided to develop necessary skills and knowledge.

Benefits

  • 14 days of Annual Leave.

  • Additional plant closure days on selected public holiday eves and post-holiday dates (e.g. Christmas Eve, Deepavali Eve, Hari Raya Haji Eve, New Year’s Eve, and Chinese New Year Eve).
    Note: ½ day of annual leave will be deducted for each full day of plant closure.

  • Annual Bonus Structure:

    - Guaranteed 1-month annual bonus (contractual, similar to AWS).

    - Performance-based variable bonus (non-guaranteed).

  • Monthly meal allowance of SGD80.

  • Annual health screening.

  • Medical, dental, and hospitalisation coverage.

  • Mandatory training hours provided for all employees to support continuous development.
